description_long: This apartment building is a rectangular, box-like structure with a flat roof and a simple, utilitarian facade. The front features two large, dark-framed windows flanking a central entrance, which appears to be a single door. The exterior walls are finished in a light, off-white color, and the windows are symmetrically placed, giving the building a balanced appearance. The sides and rear of the building are mostly plain, with minimal ornamentation, though one side has a small window and some visible objects near the base. The overall design is functional, with no balconies or decorative elements, and the building appears to be a single-story structure.
description: A simple, rectangular apartment building with a flat roof, light-colored walls, and symmetrical dark-framed windows flanking a central entrance.
description_view_0: This view shows a plain side of the building with a small window and some objects near the base, with no main entrance visible.
description_view_1: The front view displays two large, dark-framed windows and a central entrance, providing the main access to the building.
description_view_2: The rear view is mostly featureless, with a single small window and a smooth, light-colored wall.
description_view_3: This side view shows two doors, a wall lamp, and a small picture, with minimal windows or other features.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with two large windows flanking the central entrance. Other sides have minimal or single windows, with no clear pattern.
